TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_CHARACTER.cardsModifierDe: Youmu Konpaku's cards now appear in rewards and shops.
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_CHARACTER.description:
A half-human, half-phantom gardener, skilled in swordsmanship.
Capable of cutting through enemies, spirits, danmaku, and even human worries.
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_CHARACTER.goldMonologue: [sine]These gold coins... might come in handy...[/sine]
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_CHARACTER.title: Youmu Konpaku
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_CHARACTER.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
